summary: Completed comprehensive testing of JSE AI Mastery course ecosystem. Backend APIs mostly functional with one budget-related issue. Frontend working excellently with proper tier management, admin mode, paywall gates, and live AI integrations.

critical_bugs.issue: Budget exceeded error: 'Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.011052, Max budget: 0.001'
critical_bugs.impact: Council of Experts feature fails in backend testing

ui_bugs.issue: Train Your Intuition exercise not found in sidebar when expanding Tier 0

integration_issues.issue: No proper error handling for invalid exercise IDs - shows blank page

passed_tests: Dashboard loads correctly with progress stats and tier cards
Admin mode (?admin=true) unlocks all 5 tiers and shows admin badge
Non-admin mode only has Tier 0 unlocked with proper lock icons
Sidebar navigation shows correct lock/unlock status
Paywall gate displays properly with blurred preview, price, and unlock CTA
Train Your Intuition: TRUE/FALSE buttons work to sort claims into zones
Constraint Slider: Level buttons switch between 5 levels, quality score changes (12→96)
Council of Experts: LIVE Claude API returns 4 perspectives + synthesis
Bicameral Pipeline: LIVE Claude API ORSN→STDIO pipeline with verification score
ROI Calculator: inputs calculate and display chart correctly (408% ROI)
Backend input validation works for both AI endpoints
Backend Bicameral Pipeline endpoint works with proper response structure
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Emergent LLM key budget limit - current budget is $0.001 which is insufficient for Council of Experts API calls. Consider increasing budget or using a different API key.
success_percentage: Backend: 86% (6/7 tests passed), Frontend: 95% (19/20 features working)
